parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ error: 'Bad Request', message: 'name, email, and company_size are required' }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO leads (name, email, company, company_size, message, source, external_id, status) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, 'new') ON CONFLICT (email) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, company = EXCLUDED.company, company_size = EXCLUDED.company_size, message = EXCLUDED.message, source = EXCLUDED.source, external_id = EXCLUDED.external_id, updated_at = NOW() RETURNING id, name, email, status
INSERT INTO lead_audit_log (lead_id, workflow_step, model_version, input_hash, ai_output_json, execution_time_ms) VALUES ($1, 'intake', 'webhook-v1', $2, $3::jsonb, 0)

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $('Upsert Lead').first().json.id, email: $('Upsert Lead').first().json.email, status: $('Upsert Lead').first().json.status }) }}
